name: Purchase Item from Shop
description: Navigate to the in-game shop, store, or merchant interface, locate a specified item by name, and complete a purchase transaction to add it to the player's inventory.
preconditions: Player is in a navigable state (not in combat or cutscene)
Shop or merchant UI is accessible from current state
Player currency is sufficient or item cost is unknown

success: Target item appears in player inventory

memory: Known UI landmarks from current session

state_changes: Target item added to player inventory
Player currency reduced by item cost

failure_modes.recovery: Scan full frame for shop-related UI elements. Retry with broader search
Emit failure with reason=out_of_stock. Do not retry
Re-click item. If still absent escape to known state and retry from top
Abort skill. Escape to known state. Emit performance anomaly log
Flag for review. Continue execution but log deviation from expected duration
